name: Eederax
description: When the Aldorian army was routed by the Nistrian cavalry at the battle of Thorny Hill, the Eeders militia took the humiliating defeat to heart and started attaching special anti-cavalry hooks to their axes.
descriptionZh: 荆棘山一役，尼斯特拉骑兵大破奥尔多军，伊德斯的民兵由此吸取教训，给他们的斧子加上了专门对付骑兵的勾刃。
